arcs.description: Bind foreign crowns, banners, and borders under one throne.
arcs.endingBody: Legions salute a single crown. Maps are redrawn in your ink — the realm endures as one empire.

arcs.description: Feed the fen coven until the throne becomes their altar.
arcs.endingBody: Chanting fills the halls. Your crown is taken not by steel, but by a circle of witches who name a new age.

arcs.description: Hunt the wyrm from rumor to ash.
arcs.endingBody: The last scale cools in the courtyard. Songs name you Dragon's Bane — a legend forged in fire.

arcs.description: Consecrate war until faith and army become one blade.
arcs.endingBody: Banners of the faith never lower. Your reign ends not in peace, but as the Eternal Crusade marching beyond the map.

arcs.description: Let the Guild write law in ledgers and gold.
arcs.endingBody: The throne is a counting house. Merchants wear your seal — and the realm answers to Crowns of Coin.
